title: feat(sdk): update default image model from flux to zimage
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: A new default canvas
gist.blurb: We've updated the SDK's default image model to zimage, perfectly syncing it with our API. If you loved the old flux default, just pass it explicitly to keep the classic vibes!
gist.summary: The default image generation model in the JavaScript SDK has been updated from flux to zimage to match the current API defaults.
gist.impact: Developers using the SDK without specifying a model will now automatically receive images generated by zimage, ensuring consistency across the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee swapping out art supplies. She is handing a shiny new paintbrush or palette to the Monitor Robot, representing the new default model. The scene should feel creative and collaborative.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, handing a glowing new paintbrush to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. A wooden easel nearby holds a fresh canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and peach pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'ZIMAGE'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
